## TZ2.3. SECTION 3 – REGULATORY RESULT

### TZ2.3.1. ROMATSA NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE ROMANIA TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 2 IN 2025

ROMATSA reported a net gain of +0.2 MRON, as a combination of a gain of +1.3 MRON arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a loss of -1.1 MRON arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism.

### TZ2.3.2. ROMATSA OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) ON ACTIVITY IN THE TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 2

Ex-post, the overall RR taking into account the net gain from the terminal activity mentioned above (+0.2 MRON) and the actual RoE (+1.3 MRON) amounts to +1.5 MRON (2.6% of the terminal revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 14.6%, which is higher than the 12.7% planned in the PP.

### TZ2.3.3. NOTES

#### TZ2.3.3.1. NOTE 1

#### TZ2.3.3.2. NOTE 2
